# services.tahoe

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.tahoe`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.tahoe.introducers` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | The Tahoe introducers. |
| `services.tahoe.introducers.<name>.nickname` | `string` | The nickname of this Tahoe introducer. |
| `services.tahoe.introducers.<name>.package` | `package` | The tahoelafs package to use. |
| `services.tahoe.introducers.<name>.tub.location` | `null or string` | The external location that the introducer should listen on. If specified, the port should be included. |
| `services.tahoe.introducers.<name>.tub.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port on which the introducer will listen. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | The Tahoe nodes. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.client.helper` | `null or string` | The furl for a Tahoe helper node. Like all furls, keep this safe and don't share it. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.client.introducer` | `null or string` | The furl for a Tahoe introducer node. Like all furls, keep this safe and don't share it. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.client.shares.happy` | `signed integer` | The number of distinct storage nodes required to store a file. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.client.shares.needed` | `signed integer` | The number of shares required to reconstitute a file. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.client.shares.total` | `signed integer` | The number of shares required to store a file. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.helper.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable helper service. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.nickname` | `string` | The nickname of this Tahoe node. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.package` | `package` | The tahoelafs package to use. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.sftpd.accounts.file` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the accounts file. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.sftpd.accounts.url` | `null or string` | URL of the accounts server. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.sftpd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable SFTP service. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.sftpd.hostPrivateKeyFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the SSH host private key. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.sftpd.hostPublicKeyFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the SSH host public key. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.sftpd.port` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port on which the SFTP server will listen. This is the correct setting to tweak if you want Tahoe's SFTP daemon to listen on a different port. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.storage.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable storage service. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.storage.reservedSpace` | `string` | The amount of filesystem space to not use for storage. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.tub.location` | `null or string` | The external location that the node should listen on. This is the setting to tweak if there are multiple interfaces and you want to alter which interface Tahoe is advertising. If specified, the port should be included. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.tub.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port on which the tub will listen. This is the correct setting to tweak if you want Tahoe's storage system to listen on a different port. |
| `services.tahoe.nodes.<name>.web.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port on which the Web server will listen. This is the correct setting to tweak if you want Tahoe's WUI to listen on a different port. |
